workloads.name: p0 render multidraw contract
workloads.description: Directional render-pass workload focused on occlusion/timestamp query wiring and multidraw API path gating.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples contract: command shape, Dawn filter mapping, and timing normalization are explicitly aligned for strict comparability.

timingNormalization.note: Apples-to-apples render contract: normalize per draw with explicit setup amortization over the render-pass draw stream.
